COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond

-- 1 of 3 --

Now that we’ve covered the email flows to get
the customer to purchase, let’s move on to what
happens after they’ve purchased. In the next few
lessons we’ll cover several post-purchase flows.
These are important because they are intended
to help educate the customer about your brand,
continue building the relationship, clear out any
FAQ’s, and sell the customer on additional products.
Post Purchase Emails
• 	Order Confirmation
• 	Customer Thank You
• 	Shipping Confirmation
• 	How-to-Use Email
• 	Delivery Confirmation
• 	Review Request
• 	Cross-Sell or Upsell
• 	Winback Email
• 	Sunset Unengaged Subscribers
LESSON:
POST-PURCHASE: PRIMER
MODULE:
ADVANCED EMAIL
MARKETING FOR
ECOMMERCE
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Look through the post-purchase flow examples in
the Resources below.
❏ 	Start brainstorming ways in which you could use
post-purchase flows to educate your customer,
build the relationship, clear out FAQ’s and further
sell them on additional products.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
• 	Post Purchase Flow Example from

Increase Retention (Klaviyo)
